infravision.note: Some halflings (Stout) have 60' infravision. Tallfellow halflings have no infravision.

save_bonus_vs_magic.description: Halflings gain a bonus to saving throws vs. magic (rod, staff, wand, spell) and poison based on CON, same as dwarves.

hiding_ability.description: When in natural terrain (woods, bushes, tall grass), halflings can hide with a 90% success rate. Indoors, they can hide in shadows or behind cover with a 2 in 6 chance of success.

surprise_bonus.description: When alone or with halflings/elves, and not in metal armor, halflings surprise opponents on 4 in 6.
surprise_bonus.conditions: alone or with halflings/elves, not in metal armor

missile_attack_bonus.description: +1 to attack rolls with slings and thrown weapons.

detect_grades_slopes.description: Can detect grade or slope in a passage, 1-3 on d6 (Stout halflings only).

determine_direction_underground.description: Can determine approximate direction underground, 1-2 on d6 (Stout halflings only).

tallfellow.description: Slightly taller, more slender. Better with bows.
tallfellow.secret_door_detection: 1 in 6 when passing, 2 in 6 when searching
